# Check what changed between previous and current frame
if last_transition and last_transition.before_frame:
    before_seg = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation['nodes']
    after_seg = last_transition.after_frame.segmentation['nodes']
    
    # Compare important objects
    before_important = {n['id']: n for n in before_seg if n['color'] not in ['B', 'c'] or n['pixels'] != 16}

    print("Before important objects:")
    for k, v in before_important.items():
        print(f"  id={k}, color={v['color']}, pixels={v['pixels']}, hash={v['hash']}")
    
    print("\nAfter important objects:")

        print(f"  id={k}, color={v['color']}, pixels={v['pixels']}, hash={v['hash']}")
    
    # Check for differences
    print("\nDifferences:")
    all_ids = set(list(before_important.keys()) + list(after_important.keys()))
    for iid in sorted(all_ids):
        b = before_important.get(iid)
        a = after_important.get(iid)
        if b is None:

        elif b['hash'] != a['hash'] or b['color'] != a['color'] or b['pixels'] != a['pixels']:
            print(f"  CHANGED id={iid}: {b['color']}/{b['pixels']} -> {a['color']}/{a['pixels']}")

</function>
</tool_call>
